testcase.name: test_ocr_libretto_route_reachable

failure.message: ValueError: non-hexadecimal number found in fromhex() arg at position 657

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter19_split_kpi.py:98: in test_ocr_libretto_route_reachable jpg = bytes.fromhex( E ValueError: non-hexadecimal number found in fromhex() arg at position 657

testcase.name: test_anagrafiche_stats_has_custom_array

failure.message: AssertionError: 'custom' array missing from /api/anagrafiche/stats. Keys: ['privati', 'aziende', 'condomini', 'parrocchie', 'totale'] assert 'custom' in {'privati': {'n': 477, 'premio_totale': 0.0}, 'aziende': {'n': 6, 'premio_totale': 0.0}, 'condomini': {'n': 2, 'premio_totale': 0.0}, 'parrocchie': {'n': 11, 'premio_totale': 0.0}, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter19_split_kpi.py:194: in test_anagrafiche_stats_has_custom_array assert "custom" in data, \ E AssertionError: 'custom' array missing from /api/anagrafiche/stats. Keys: ['privati', 'aziende', 'condomini', 'parrocchie', 'totale'] E assert 'custom' in {'privati': {'n': 477, 'premio_totale': 0.0}, 'aziende': {'n': 6, 'premio_totale': 0.0}, 'condomini': {'n': 2, 'premio_totale': 0.0}, 'parrocchie': {'n': 11, 'premio_totale': 0.0}, ...}
